{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Cinderbeast
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Cinderbeast]] was in the stands of the [[arena]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Cinderbeast]] attempted to gore the [[Woodsman]] by bucking its head.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
